how to choose a personal injury lawyer

hero.label: CHOOSING A WICHITA LAWYER
hero.title: Bull Attorneys Reviews in Wichita: What to Look for Before You Hire a Personal Injury Lawyer

author.name: Bradley A. Pistotnik (Trial Lawyer)
author.bio: Brad Pistotnik is the CEO of Bull Attorneys®, P.A. and a Kansas trucking and personal injury lawyer with over 45 years of experience. He focuses on serious injury and truck accident cases involving DOT regulations and commercial vehicle safety standards.

sections.content: When people search for 'Bull Attorneys reviews' or 'best personal injury attorney Wichita KS,' they're usually trying to answer one question: can I trust this law firm with my case? The best way to judge a firm is to look at both reviews and proof.

sections.label: START HERE
sections.heading: Start With Reviews — But Don't Stop There
paragraphs: Client reviews can tell you a lot about how a law firm treats people. Do clients say the firm returns calls? Do they say the lawyers explained the process clearly? Do they mention respect, updates, and support?
Bull Attorneys' site includes many 5-star testimonials mentioning communication, professionalism, quick updates, and help after a car accident.

testimonial.quote: They explained every step of the process, kept me informed, and fought tenaciously with the insurance companies to achieve the best possible outcome.

sections.label: LOOK FOR EXPERIENCE
sections.heading: Decades of Serious-Case Focus
sections.intro: Experience matters in personal injury law — especially in serious accident cases.

primaryStats.label: Year Brad Pistotnik earned his J.D.
Focus on trucking & catastrophic crash cases

sections.label: SERIOUS CASE RESULTS
sections.heading: Look for the Right Kind of Wins
sections.intro: Results don't guarantee what will happen in a new case, but they can show the level of case a law firm has handled before.

image.alt: Bull Attorneys lawyer consulting with an injury client in Wichita

results.description: Motor vehicle accident with a commercial truck
Tractor-trailer accident, semi on wrong side of road

sections.footnote: Results may vary depending on your particular facts and legal circumstances.

items.heading: Free 24/7 consultation
items.text: Accidents don't wait — neither do we.

items.heading: Direct attorney access
items.text: Every client gets their attorney's personal cell phone number.

sections.label: THE WHOLE PICTURE
sections.heading: What Searchers Usually Mean by "Best Personal Injury Lawyer"
sections.intro: Don't rely on just one signal. The right lawyer should make you feel informed, respected, and supported.

faqs.question: What should I look for when reading Bull Attorneys reviews?
faqs.answer: Look for patterns in client feedback about communication, updates, professionalism, respect, and how the firm handled the case from start to finish.

faqs.question: Are reviews enough when choosing a personal injury lawyer?
faqs.answer: No. Reviews matter, but you should also look at years of experience, the types of cases handled, serious case results, local Wichita knowledge, and how the fee structure works.

faqs.question: What experience does Bull Attorneys highlight on its website?
faqs.answer: The Bull Attorneys site says the firm was founded in 1983 and focuses on car accidents, truck accidents, and wrongful death cases. Brad Pistotnik's bio says he earned his J.D. in 1981 and has long focused on trucking litigation and catastrophic crash cases.

faqs.question: Why do some people search for Brad Pistotnik Law instead of Bull Attorneys?
faqs.answer: Bull Attorneys' home page says the firm was formerly Brad Pistotnik Law, P.A., so some people may still search using older firm-name terms.

faqs.question: What makes a personal injury lawyer a good fit after a serious crash?
faqs.answer: A good fit may include strong communication, experience with serious injuries and truck cases, clear fees, local knowledge, and a track record of handling major claims.

schema.articleBody: When choosing a personal injury lawyer in Wichita, reviews are a good starting point but not enough on their own. Bull Attorneys was founded in 1983 and has won over $400 million in settlements, with a focus on trucking and catastrophic crash cases. Brad Pistotnik earned his J.D. in 1981 and has decades of serious-case experience. Clients should also look at case results, fee structure, and direct attorney access before hiring.

disclaimer: This blog provides general information only, not legal advice. Reading it does not create an attorney-client relationship. Every case is different. Results vary depending on each case's facts and legal circumstances. Deadlines and laws can change, so speak directly with an attorney about your accident.
